description: Style NoteHitting all the season's fashion notes right, this pair of sandals from catwalk is a closet essential that'll go with all your summer favourites. You can wear this to snazz up a simple look, but don't forget to style them with tonal accessories!Heel: 2"Product DetailsBrown upper with cutouts referencing the clog styleHas a padded footbedMini heel with a plastic heel cap (comes with a spare pair of heel caps)TPU outsole with patterned groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
